DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF DANIEL DAVIS' MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS MOOT AS RESPONSES HAVE BEEN SERVED. THE COURT WILL NOT DETERMINE THE ADEQUACY OF THOSE RESPONSES ON THIS MOTION. THE LATE RESPONSES WERE A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $840, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT. NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Special Interrgoatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Deft Thien Truong Doan And His Attorney Peter Mallon
Off Calendar Jul-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted.

PLAINTIFF DANIEL DAVIS' Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents is moot as responses have been served. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion. The late responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $840, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
